violations.text: The condensate from the air conditioner was observed draining into the hand washing sink. Condensate/wastewater must drain into and drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

The coving in the front kitchen is in poor repair, observed missing pieces. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2025

Mozzarella and chicken were observed held at 43-45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved to walk-in cooler. Foods were put in unit less than 2 hours prior, foods were relocated to walk-in cooler at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Establishment is using time as a control for pizza without written approval. PIC informed to cease process until approval is granted from RIDOH CFP. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
Observed missing hot water knozel on hand wash sink located in the back kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2025
The following units were not in good repair. 1. Pizza prep unit 2. Reach-in refrigerator Ambient of refrigeration units must be at 41F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The coving in the front kitchen is in poor repair, observed missing pieces. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The ledge next to the ware washing area is in poor repair, observed exposed wood with incomplete seal. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

The prep sink is lacking a proper air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
The coving in the kitchen area is in poor repair, observed missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024
The ceiling tile in the ware washing area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
